applyTo: "**/result/**"
description: "Branded alias of the API testing rules for result/ based outputs."
---

# API Testing — Mandatory Rules

This file is the branded alias of `api-testing.instructions.md`.
Use the same operational contract:

- spec in `specs/`
- prompt source in `.github/prompts/`
- all generated artifacts in `result/<slug>/`
- runtime tooling tracked in source code
- no success-only coverage claims
- no real secrets committed
